name: Dave's Meat Loaf
recipeIngredient: 2 slices bread, torn into soft crumbs
a few drops of Worcestershire sauce and Tobasco sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Gently shape the mixture into a round loaf.
3. Place the loaf on a trivet in the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for about 7 to 8 hours.
5. Serve with tomato sauce or chili sauce.
6. Chill leftovers and slice for sandwiches the next day.
Most soups and stews can be prepared in a crock pot. Just decrease the liquid ingredients (as less liquid will evaporate from a closed slow-cooker) and let it cook for 6 or more hours.
